title: Maxime-Arnaud Keable Bolsters McCarthy Tétrault’s Market-Leading National Litigation Group
content:
## Maxime-Arnaud Keable Bolsters McCarthy Tétrault’s Market-Leading National Litigation Group
We are pleased to welcome partner Maxime-Arnaud Keable to our top-ranked National Litigation & Dispute Resolution Group. Maxime will be based in our Québec City office.
A seasoned litigator with more than 15 years’ experience, Maxime’s arrival further strengthens our growing presence in the Québec market. He brings deep expertise in complex commercial disputes, with a recognized focus on public and administrative law. Maxime has appeared before civil courts and arbitration panels in cases involving challenges to government decrees, municipal by-laws, and disciplinary proceedings.
“Joining McCarthy Tétrault is an exciting next step for my practice. The firm’s collaborative culture, national platform, and deep bench of litigation talent create the ideal environment to deliver strategic, practical solutions to clients facing complex legal challenges,” Maxime says. With this perspective, Maxime brings both enthusiasm and a clear vision for how his practice will thrive within the firm’s dynamic litigation group.
A trusted advisor, Maxime regularly represents public institutions, professional regulators, and private companies on high-stakes matters involving government contracts, regulatory frameworks, and judicial review. In addition to his deep understanding of the legal landscape, Maxime’s commitment to developing expert-level insight into his clients’ industries ensures his guidance is both strategic and practical—for businesses navigating today’s evolving regulatory environment.
With Maxime’s arrival, the firm continues to build on its momentum. “We are absolutely thrilled to welcome him to the team. Maxime adds even more strength to our top-tier dispute resolution practice and deepens our market-leading position, including in administrative law,” says Tom Sutton , Practice Group Leader of McCarthy Tétrault’s national Litigation & Dispute Resolution team.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
